global.description: The ad features a modern design with a purple background and bold text.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Purple abstract background
elements.description: A smooth purple background with abstract shapes creating a modern and dynamic feel.

elements.label: Last-minute savings
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Last-minute savings' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Flexible booking options'.

elements.label: Central geometric shapes
elements.description: A large oval and square shape in the center, adding visual interest and depth.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent yellow button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in bold, inviting font.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' displayed at the top left in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold letters.

elements.label: Circular decorative elements
elements.description: Three small circles arranged horizontally, adding a decorative touch to the design.
